title: dioscorea laevis
intro: Dioscorea laevis, also known as the Chinese yam or white yam, is a type of perennial vine native to East Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the production of cortisol, which helps the body respond to stress. The health benefits of Dioscorea laevis include its potential to aid in weight loss, improve immune function, and reduce inflammation. Dioscorea laevis is often prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and can also be consumed as a traditional food in East Asian cuisine.
